domain: Inuit katajjaq throat-singing duel (women's vocal-game; two-singer face-to-face; turn-taking imitate/respond rhythmic patterns; first-to-laugh/stop/run-out-of-breath loses)
specific_mechanism: Two-clone alternating self-play with asymmetric BREAK-FAILURE penalty: clones A and B alternately produce N-token segments conditioning on opponent's previous segment + shared anchor prompt. If clone X (i) emits EOS earlier than allowed budget (run-out-of-breath), (ii) hallucinates / violates format rule (laughter analog), or (iii) repeats opponent's pattern verbatim (pattern collapse), clone X immediately loses the round. Loss attributed entirely to the breaker; continuer receives full reward. Trained via PPO with break-event detector providing terminal reward.
llm_application: KATAJJAQ-BREAK: a two-clone self-play training algorithm with asymmetric break-failure penalty. Round structure: (1) two LLM clones A,B initialized from same checkpoint; (2) shared anchor prompt p_0; (3) alternate turns A→B→A→... each producing N tokens conditioned on opponent's last segment + p_0; (4) break detector monitors (i) premature EOS (length<min_budget), (ii) format-violation/hallucination, (iii) verbatim-repeat of opponent (n-gram-overlap > θ); (5) on first break by clone X, terminate with reward(X)=-1 + reward(Y)=+1. PPO update against terminal-only reward. Differs from SPC 2504.19162 (sneaky-generator vs critic with stepwise reward, not break-failure attribution), Code-A1 2603.15611 (code-test coevolution with continuous reward, not break-failure), Multi-Agent Evolve 2510.23595 (Proposer-Solver-Judge tri-agent, not duel), Digital Red Queen (Core War assembly programs). Differs from R419 KOMI-WARD (defensive-prefix coevolution at input boundary) by within-generation BREAK-attribution mechanism. Differs from R424 TLINGIT-POTLATCH (second-price escalation scoring) by break-failure-only attribution.
novelty_claim: SPC + Code-A1 + Multi-Agent Evolve + DRQ + Adversarial Preference Learning cover self-play coevolution + dual-agent adversarial training. KATAJJAQ-BREAK adds ASYMMETRIC BREAK-FAILURE penalty with explicit (a) premature-EOS, (b) format-violation/hallucination, (c) verbatim-repeat detectors. Recombination of self-play + break-event terminal reward.
